grammarNote.title: Mastery: Technical Control
grammarNote.explanation:
L'alerte est là. C'est mécanique. Avril maîtrise le réacteur. — maîtriser means to master, to take control of something complex.

Notice the vocabulary shift: câble, mécanique, réacteur, alerte. Technical words, but the sentence patterns are the same ones from chapter 1.

Re-read and list the technical vocabulary. Then notice: the grammar hasn't changed — only the words have grown.
